docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF RONALD MESIA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS VERONIKA CLAIO. DEFENDANT AUTOLINX IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MESIA, RONALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AUTOLINX THE DEFENDANT WAS NO LIABLE FOR THE PLAINTIFF'S LOSSES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MESIA, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOLINX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-26-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOLINX
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ED MURAD, PRESIDENT FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTOLINX
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MESIA, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOLINX
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2023 - JUDGMENT.
